project_type: AWS CDK Go application - Event-Driven Sleep Audio Pipeline
build_system: Go modules + AWS CDK CLI (npx cdk). GOPROXY=direct required for module downloads. NODE_OPTIONS must be set to empty string to avoid jsii runtime failure.
test_framework: Go testing package with CDK assertions (github.com/aws/aws-cdk-go/awscdk/v2/assertions). Tests in cdk-base_test.go use Template_FromStack with HasResourceProperties, AllResourcesProperties, ResourceCountIs, and Match helpers. Lambda tests in lambda/processor/main_test.go use standard Go testing.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'NODE_OPTIONS="" GOPROXY=direct go test -v ./...' and confirm all tests pass. 2. Run 'NODE_OPTIONS="" GOPROXY=direct npx cdk synth' and confirm synthesis succeeds.
setup_instructions: Dependencies download via 'GOPROXY=direct go mod download'. CDK CLI available via npx.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. storage.googleapis.com is blocked so GOPROXY must be set to 'direct'. NODE_OPTIONS env var has a broken preload path; must be cleared (NODE_OPTIONS='') for any jsii/CDK operation. Go 1.25.1 and Node.js v22 available.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then minimal code to pass. All commits must use Conventional Commits format. ARCHITECTURE.md must stay in sync with code changes. Run 'go test ./...' and 'cdk synth' before pushing.
key_patterns: Single stack function NewCdkBaseStack in cdk-base.go. Tests each create fresh app+stack with assertions.Template_FromStack. Pattern: template.HasResourceProperties for specific checks, template.AllResourcesProperties for invariants across resource type, Match_ArrayWith/Match_ObjectLike/Match_StringLikeRegexp for flexible matching. State machine definition verified via Fn::Join array with regex matching on serialized JSON.
directory_structure: Root: cdk-base.go (main CDK stack), cdk-base_test.go (CDK assertion tests), cdk.json (CDK config), go.mod/go.sum (Go dependencies). lambda/processor/ contains the Go Lambda function. .github/workflows/ci.yml contains CI. ARCHITECTURE.md is the source of truth for design.
